title: BLKSEQ missed when connecting module port to array

features.name: sequential_block_with_blocking_assignment_to_output_port
features.description: Code should include a module with a sequential always block containing a blocking assignment to an output reg port
features.snippet: module m(output reg out); always @(posedge clk) out = 1; endmodule

features.name: module_port_connected_to_unpacked_array_element
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is connected to an element of an unpacked array

features.name: module_port_connected_to_packed_array_slice
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is connected to part of a packed array or vector
